complaintDesc: I booked this train ticket outside Begumpet station using Railone App for traveling to Udgir Maharashtra from Begumpet Hyderabad Why this Railone App gives me ticket of travel from Udgir Maharashtra to Begumpet when Im currently at location of Begumpet Hyderabad
remarks:
Sir,
Spoken with the passenger and informed that the issue has been forwarded to the technical team for necessary action. The passenger was thanked for the valuable suggestion regarding the issue.
